sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36654" key="e)ca/llagma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξάλλ-αγμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n36654.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">recreation, amusement,</tr_> in pl., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0405.tlg001:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anaxandr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">20</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0655.tlg001.perseus-grc1:24:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Parth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">24.1</biblScope> </bibl> (dub.).</sense> </entryFree>
